heroes.skillDesc: Shield Charge — crashes shield-first into the nearest foe, dealing 1.6× ATK and taunting nearby enemies.
heroes.ultDesc: Iron Fortress — becomes briefly invulnerable and reflects 50% of all incoming damage back at attackers.
heroes.silhouetteNotes: Round shield on left arm, tiny sword, copper-toned armour, stubby chibi legs

heroes.skillDesc: Spore Mend — releases a cloud of healing spores that restore 1.4× ATK as HP to all heroes.
heroes.ultDesc: Mycelium Surge — massive AoE spore explosion that heals all allies and poisons every enemy on screen.
heroes.silhouetteNotes: Large mushroom cap hat, spore pouch on back, short staff with glowing green tip
heroes.spritePrompt: 64x64 transparent chibi pixel sprite sheet, mushroom healer, spore pouch, green healing particles, cap bob, friendly face.

heroes.skillDesc: Spark Burst — fires 5 electrified sparks in a fan pattern, each dealing 0.5× ATK to separate targets.
heroes.ultDesc: Coin Barrage — unleashes a rapid volley of electrified coins at 2.5× ATK total; crits drop bonus gold.
heroes.silhouetteNotes: Tiny goblin with oversized spark pistol, goggles, coin bag on belt

heroes.skillDesc: Boulder Toss — hurls a massive boulder dealing 1.6× ATK to a row of enemies.
heroes.ultDesc: Earthshatter — slams the ground with both fists, stunning all enemies and dealing 2.8× ATK to all.

heroes.skillDesc: Cherry Kaboom — lobs a bomb that detonates in a blast radius for 1.7× ATK fire damage.
heroes.ultDesc: Inferno Barrage — drops 8 cherry bombs across the arena dealing 3.0× ATK total fire damage in a chain of explosions.

heroes.skillDesc: Shield Bubble — wraps the lowest-HP hero in an ice bubble that absorbs the next 2 incoming hits.
heroes.ultDesc: Arctic Blessing — blankets all heroes in protective ice shields and heals the entire squad for 2.5× ATK HP.

heroes.skillDesc: Silver Split — fires a moon arrow that splits into 3 shadow bolts on impact, each dealing 1.6× ATK.
heroes.ultDesc: Crescent Storm — unleashes 12 splitting moon arrows in all directions at 2.8× ATK total damage.

heroes.skillDesc: Royal Heist — commands minion rats to swarm a target for 1.5× ATK; guaranteed 1 extra gold drop on kill.
heroes.ultDesc: Golden Jubilee — all gold drops triple for 8 seconds; allies gain a 20% ATK bonus for the duration.

heroes.skillDesc: Static Charge — charges up the totem, boosting all allies' attack speed by 30% for 6 seconds.
heroes.ultDesc: Lightning Cascade — totem fires 5 lightning bolts that each chain to 2 additional targets at 3.0× ATK total.
